insights.anomalies: Four ads listed as 'Electrician work' under education (a misfit category) and one finance ad dated in 2026 (future timestamp) indicate severe data classification errors or system glitches requiring immediate validation.
insights.monthly_trends: The dominance of education (1228 ads) and health (1228 ads) suggests structural shifts toward service-oriented verticals. The absence of real_estate (179) and insurance (136) ads in top 10 may signal seasonal rotation or reduced focus.
insights.predicted_opportunities: Prioritize high-volume verticals like education and health, which dominate ad activity. Explore niche angles within home_improvement and auto, which show strong engagement but lower ad saturation compared to top categories.
insights.today_moves: A massive surge of 1,131 new ads in the last 24 hours indicates aggressive campaign scaling or a sudden shift in advertising strategy. Active ads (395) remain stable, suggesting new ads are being launched without removing existing ones.
insights.weekly_patterns: A 6,599 new ad spike over 7 days (nearly 92% of total tracked ads) shows extreme acceleration in ad creation, likely due to a major campaign launch or seasonal event. No recent events recorded, which may indicate data gaps or a lack of external triggers.
